projects.title: Operation: Broken Arrow
projects.description: On-set supervision and continuity management for 'Operation: Broken Arrow'.

photos.description: Continuity Log: The master continuity binder for 'Operation: Broken Arrow', documenting every detail of the Muddy textures, blood stains, distressed military wool, 1940s gear looks to ensure frame-to-frame consistency.
Wardrobe Trailer: Systematic organization of 'Operation: Broken Arrow' costumes, categorized by character and scene for rapid on-set changes.

Distress Work: Specialized aging and weathering techniques applied to 'Operation: Broken Arrow' costumes to create a realistic Muddy textures, blood stains, distressed military wool, 1940s gear patina.

On-Set Monitor: A view from video village for 'Operation: Broken Arrow', verifying that the costumes read correctly on camera in the specific Muddy textures, blood stains, distressed military wool, 1940s gear lighting conditions.

Set Atmosphere: Cast chairs and warm-up coats for 'Operation: Broken Arrow', capturing the on-set environment during the production of this Muddy textures, blood stains, distressed military wool, 1940s gear feature.

Scripted Damage: A continuity asset for 'Operation: Broken Arrow' documenting specific costume damage required by the script for the Muddy textures, blood stains, distressed military wool, 1940s gear sequences.

Night Logistics: Set preparation for 'Operation: Broken Arrow' night shoots, highlighting the texture of Muddy textures, blood stains, distressed military wool, 1940s gear textiles under artificial set lighting.
